title: Specify plants for landscapes
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Specify plants for landscapes demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Develop a client brief

pcs.text: Discuss and clarify client needs and objectives
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Discuss and clarify client needs and objectives?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Discuss and clarify client needs and objectives.

pcs.text: Identify purposes of the landscape and client expectations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify purposes of the landscape and client expectations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify purposes of the landscape and client expectations.

pcs.text: Establish plant selection criteria
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Establish plant selection criteria?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish plant selection criteria.

pcs.text: Consult with client to finalise agreement of the brief
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Consult with client to finalise agreement of the brief?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Consult with client to finalise agreement of the brief.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Develop a client brief

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select species and cultivars according to the size and aspect of the site.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Consider and apply environmental conditions to the functional characteristics of the plant.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine the suitability of the soil for the plants selected.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Evaluate and document plant selection and rationale?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Evaluate and document plant selection and rationale.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Make recommendations for soil improvements for the selected plant species.
